metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace for spec-driven development.

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Personal spec-driven development workflow: constitution, spec, tech plan, task breakdown, and focused implementation with review gates.

plugins.name: branch-cleanup
plugins.description: Finds and cleans up stale local branches and worktrees left over from feature work — auto-removes what's safely inactive, asks about the rest.
